name: deepseek-v4-qa
displayName: DeepSeek V4 QA — Vision + Token Tracking
description: DeepSeek V4 Pro & Flash in Copilot Chat with vision proxy, token tracking, balance estimation, reasoning cache, and session spend. Merges the best of Vizards/deepseek-v4-for-copilot (vision proxy) and Laurent00TT/deepseek-v4-vscode-chat (balance + session tracking).

commands.title: DeepSeek QA: Set Vision Proxy Model
DeepSeek QA: Show Reasoning Cache Stats

deepseek-qa.maxTokens.description: Maximum output tokens per request. 0 = API default (no limit).

enumDescriptions: Faster responses with shorter reasoning chains.
Maximum reasoning depth; slower and uses more tokens.
deepseek-qa.reasoningEffort.markdownDescription: Reasoning effort for `(thinking)` model variants. Has no effect on non-thinking variants.

deepseek-qa.modelIdOverrides.description: Optional API model ID overrides for DeepSeek-compatible proxy endpoints.

deepseek-v4-flash.description: API model ID to use for DeepSeek V4 Flash variants.

deepseek-v4-pro.description: API model ID to use for DeepSeek V4 Pro variants.

deepseek-qa.visionModel.description: Model ID for vision proxy (describes images for text-only DeepSeek). Leave empty for auto-detection. Use 'DeepSeek QA: Set Vision Proxy Model' to pick from a list.

deepseek-qa.visionPrompt.default: Describe the visual contents of this image in detail, including any text, objects, people, or context that would be relevant for understanding it. Focus on factual visual elements.
deepseek-qa.visionPrompt.description: Prompt sent to the vision proxy model when describing image attachments.

walkthroughs.title: DeepSeek V4 QA — Setup
walkthroughs.description: Set up your DeepSeek API key and start using V4 models in Copilot Chat with vision + token tracking.

steps.title: Set your DeepSeek API key
steps.description:
[Get an API key](https://platform.deepseek.com/api_keys) from platform.deepseek.com.
[Set API Key](command:deepseek-qa.setApiKey)

steps.title: Pick a DeepSeek V4 model
steps.description: Open Copilot Chat and select a DeepSeek V4 QA variant from the model picker. Four variants available: Pro/Flash × thinking/non-thinking. If they are hidden, use Manage Provider from the picker menu.

steps.title: Tune reasoning effort (optional)
steps.description: Switch between `high` and `max` for `(thinking)` variants. [Open Reasoning Effort Setting](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22deepseek-qa.reasoningEffort%22)

scripts.clean: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('out', { recursive: true, force: true, maxRetries: process.platform === 'win32' ? 10 : 0 })"
